source_files.main.spy:
from game_entity import Entity
from monster import Monster

def main():
    e: Entity = Entity(1)
    print(e.describe())
    
    m: Entity = Monster(2, 50)
    print(m.describe())
    
    m2: Monster = Monster(3, 100)
    print(m2.describe())
    print(m2.health)
